headline: Oracle shares gain after report it leads race for Japanese government cloud contract (ORCL)
summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) shares moved higher in premarket trading on Monday after a report suggested the company is leading the competition to provide cloud infrastructure services to the Japanese government.
